summary: Completed testing of CVD (Cumulative Volume Delta) feature. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). All 6 frontend tests passed (100%). CVD endpoint returns valid data with correct volume math (buy_volume + sell_volume = total_volume) and percentage math (buy_pct + sell_pct = 100). CVD panel renders correctly in the right sidebar with all required elements.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/cvd/MNQ returns valid data with cvd, buy_volume, sell_volume, cvd_trend, sentiment
✅ CVD trend has valid values (RISING or FALLING)
✅ CVD sentiment has valid values (STRONG_BUY, BULLISH, NEUTRAL, BEARISH, STRONG_SELL)
✅ POST /api/analyze with symbol MNQ returns cvd object in response
✅ CVD in analyze response has all 16 required fields
✅ Frontend: CVD panel renders with data-testid='cvd-panel'
✅ Frontend: CVD value renders with data-testid='cvd-value' (showing +2,161)
✅ Frontend: CVD trend badge renders with data-testid='cvd-trend' (showing ▲ RISING)
✅ Frontend: CVD sentiment badge renders with data-testid='cvd-sentiment' (showing BULLISH)
✅ Frontend: Buy/Sell volume bar renders in CVD panel (Buy 55.8% / Sell 44.2%)
✅ Frontend: Buy Vol, Sell Vol, Total Vol values display correctly
test_credentials: No auth needed - public API endpoints
seed_data_creation: None required - CVD uses DataBento trades data with simulated fallback when market is closed
context_for_next_testing_agent: CVD (Cumulative Volume Delta) feature fully tested. CVD calculates buy_volume - sell_volume from DataBento trade data using the side field (A=seller aggressor, B=buyer aggressor). When market is closed, returns simulated data (source: 'simulated'). CVD panel is located in the right sidebar between TICK Index and Volume Profile panels. All data-testid attributes in place: cvd-panel, cvd-value, cvd-trend, cvd-sentiment.

feature_verification.cvd_endpoint_mnq: Working - GET /api/cvd/MNQ returns valid CVD data
feature_verification.cvd_endpoint_mes: Working - GET /api/cvd/MES returns valid CVD data
feature_verification.cvd_value_ui: Working - Shows CVD value with +/- sign

mocked_api_note: CVD falls back to simulated data when DataBento trades unavailable (market closed). This is expected behavior.
